summary: Comprehensive testing of Staylet SaaS foundation completed. Backend APIs working well (87.5% success rate), frontend authentication flow working perfectly, dashboard and navigation functional with minor UI overlay issue.

minor_issues.issue: Return 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Semantic difference only - both indicate unauthorized access correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Tasks navigation link not clickable due to bottom section overlay
ui_bugs.details: Bottom sidebar section with 'Current Plan' info overlaps clickable area

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct hero headline 'Short-let compliance, handled.'
Navigation links (Benefits, Pricing, FAQ) work correctly
Start Free Trial button navigates to signup page
Sign in button navigates to login page
Signup form creates new user successfully
Login form shows error for invalid credentials
After signup, user redirected to /app dashboard
Dashboard displays all 5 stat cards (Total Properties, Upcoming Expiries, Overdue Items, Missing Documents, Tasks Due)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor sidebar overlay issue where bottom section prevents Tasks navigation link from being clickable. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of the 'Current Plan' section.
